allow:
Bash(git -C "C:/sitespeak/Backend" commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Rewrite insights search for comprehensive field coverage

- Remove isTest filter from NL queries \(was hiding all test data\)
- Search ALL fields including JSON arrays \(trades, systems, materials, etc.\)
- Client-side scoring with relevance ranking
- Simplified executeSearch - removed over-engineered semantic search layer
- Added fallbacks when embeddings not available
- Detailed logging for debugging

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -C "C:/sitespeak/Backend" commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Re-enable semantic search with OpenAI embeddings

- Semantic search now primary search method \(understands meaning\)
- Keyword search as fallback if embeddings unavailable
- Lower similarity threshold \(0.5\) for broader matches
- "material damage" can now find "scratch in glazing"

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -C "C:/sitespeak/Backend" commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Improve search relevance - filter stop words, require min score

- Raise semantic threshold from 0.5 to 0.68 for better precision
- Filter out generic words like "items", "things", "related"
- Require minimum score of 5 \(at least one meaningful field match\)
- Better logging of matched words and fields
- Prevents irrelevant results from flooding search

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -C "C:/sitespeak/Backend" commit -m "Clean up debug code and configure OTA updates

- Remove debug alerts and console.logs added for iOS PDF diagnosis
- Change runtimeVersion from appVersion to fingerprint policy
- Add update settings for automatic OTA check on app load

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>")

Bash(Your recording will be transcribed automatically."
- This gives users confidence their voice memo was recorded

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -C "C:/sitespeak/Backend" commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Rename Events to Observations and add positive observation types

- Renamed "Events" to "Observations" throughout the app UI
- Added new positive observation types: Productivity Gain, Milestone, Progress, Recognition
- Updated translations for English, Spanish, and Turkish
- Updated backend AI parser to recognize and classify positive observations
- Added green/blue color scheme for positive observation types

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -C "C:/sitespeak/Backend" commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add project invitation UI and team management

- Create project-invitations.controller.js with full CRUD for invitations
- Create project-invitations.routes.js with API endpoints
- Add invitation API functions to frontend \(sendProjectInvitation, getMyInvitations, etc.\)
- Create PendingInvitations component showing user''s pending invites
- Create project-team.tsx page for managing project members
- Add Team button to project cards on projects screen
- Add query keys for invitations and members

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -C "C:/sitespeak/Backend" commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add collaboration support with optimistic locking

- Add version, createdById, lastModifiedById fields to Event model
- Implement optimistic locking in events.controller update method
- Return 409 Conflict with last modifier info when version mismatch
- Add ConflictError type and isConflictError helper to frontend API
- Update event-detail.tsx to handle conflicts with refresh option
- Include version in save requests for conflict detection

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -C "C:/sitespeak/Backend" commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Enforce data privacy: add access control to forms and photos

Security fixes:
- Add accessibleProjectIds checks to all forms controller methods
- Add accessibleProjectIds checks to all photos controller methods
- Update forms routes to require authentication and loadAccessibleProjects
- Update photos routes to require loadAccessibleProjects
- Verify user has project access before any CRUD operations

This ensures:
- Users can only see forms/photos from projects they are members of
- Users cannot access data from other projects via direct ID access
- Data remains isolated within project boundaries
- Removing a user from a project immediately revokes their access

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
